name: ExportApi
summary: Connection Rest API 3.0 — Export endpoints. Auto-generated REST surface; one method per HTTP operation.

methods.name: ExportIomAsync
methods.signature: Task<string> ExportIomAsync(Guid projectId, int connectionId, string version)
methods.summary: Exports the connection to XML which includes the OpenModelContainer (https://github.com/idea-statica/ideastatica-public/blob/main/src/IdeaRS.OpenModel/OpenModelContainer.cs).

params.name: projectId
params.doc: The unique identifier of the opened project.

params.name: connectionId
params.doc: The ID of the connection to export.

params.name: version
params.doc: Optional version string for downgrading the IOM model.

throws.when: Thrown by the SDK when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: ExportIomConnectionDataAsync
methods.summary: Gets the ConnectionData for the specified connection (https://github.com/idea-statica/ideastatica-public/blob/main/src/IdeaRS.OpenModel/Connection/ConnectionData.cs).

params.name: projectId
params.doc: The unique identifier of the opened project.

params.name: connectionId
params.doc: The ID of the connection to export.

throws.when: Thrown by the SDK when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: ExportIFCAsync
methods.summary: Exports the connection to IFC format.

params.doc: The unique identifier of the opened project.
